stories.headline: Power regulators weigh fast-track approvals for data center corridors across the South
stories.summary: utilities debate how quickly new capacity can come online as large compute projects stack up
stories.whyItMatters: household reliability and industrial growth are now tied to the same buildout decisions

stories.headline: Colorado basin talks tighten as rural districts brace for new water restrictions
stories.summary: regional talks converge on emergency conservation targets ahead of peak summer demand
stories.whyItMatters: food production, municipal planning, and interstate coordination all tighten at once

stories.headline: More states move from pilot programs to statewide school phone restrictions
stories.summary: districts move from pilots to broader restrictions while working through enforcement details
stories.whyItMatters: policy momentum is outrunning implementation capacity in many systems

stories.headline: Farm groups press for crop insurance changes as drought losses spread westward
stories.summary: state advocates want faster claims handling and revised risk models as drought widens
stories.whyItMatters: insurance rules are becoming operating rules for farms under climate pressure

stories.headline: Consumer advocates push back on utility rate hikes tied to new server campus demand
stories.summary: public hearings are testing who pays when transmission upgrades follow industrial demand spikes
stories.whyItMatters: rate design will shape whether public support for AI-era grid expansion holds

stories.headline: District discipline data shows uneven rollout of classroom device rules
stories.summary: early district reporting shows rule enforcement varies sharply by school and staffing level
stories.whyItMatters: the practical story is whether attention rules widen discipline disparities

stories.headline: Chip expansion plans reignite debate over industrial water use in high-growth regions
stories.summary: large manufacturing projects are colliding with local concerns over water, land, and subsidies
stories.whyItMatters: industrial policy and local resource stress are becoming the same public argument

stories.headline: Emergency reservoir rule changes trigger legal review across western states
stories.summary: temporary operating changes are shifting release timing and local planning assumptions
stories.whyItMatters: emergency rules can harden into precedent if another stress season follows

stories.headline: District buyers revisit edtech contracts as classroom attention priorities shift
stories.summary: buyers are reevaluating software categories that expanded during remote learning
stories.whyItMatters: budget changes are a durable downstream signal for where schools are headed
